_comment: Minimum line-coverage thresholds to prevent regression. Update these values after merging significant batches of new tests. See docs/coverage.md for baseline measurements and instructions.

ratchet._comment: Thresholds rise by increment% per ratchet cycle until target is reached. Run scripts/advance-ratchet.py to advance.

_comment_changed_file: Minimum line coverage required for any changed source file on pull requests (checked by scripts/check-pr-coverage.py).

overall.note: Baseline 53.5 % after PR#145 - warning fixes added non-exercised lines
